Senior Product Operations Analyst
Brightline Care Software | Remote | 2021-2026

- Supported product operations for a B2B SaaS care coordination platform used by
  enterprise healthcare customers across implementation, clinical operations,
  and customer success workflows.
- Partnered with product managers to translate roadmap priorities, customer
  feedback, launch timelines, and operational constraints into clear action
  plans.
- Built repeatable processes for roadmap intake, release readiness, customer
  feedback triage, beta tracking, and post-launch measurement.
- Synthesized support tickets, CRM notes, sales feedback, customer interviews,
  implementation notes, and product analytics into concise product
  recommendations.
- Created SQL-based dashboards in Looker to monitor feature adoption, workflow
  completion, retention signals, and post-launch usage patterns.
- Used spreadsheets for quick analysis, scenario modeling, operational tracking,
  and prioritization support during quarterly planning.
- Combined quantitative usage data with qualitative customer feedback to
  identify recurring workflow pain points and recommend product or process
  improvements.
- Prepared executive summaries on launch health, adoption trends, customer
  friction, customer-request patterns, and operational risks.
- Coordinated cross-functional release planning across product, engineering,
  design, customer success, implementation, and clinical operations teams.
- Maintained launch checklists covering dependencies, enablement materials,
  customer communications, release timing, support readiness, and follow-up
  owners.
- Monitored early adoption after major releases and coordinated follow-up when
  customers experienced confusion, friction, or incomplete workflow adoption.
- Improved the product intake process in Jira and Notion, reducing duplicate
  requests and making prioritization decisions easier for product managers.
- Helped product teams distinguish one-off enterprise customer requests from
  broader market patterns by reviewing feedback volume, customer segment, and
  workflow impact.
- Facilitated roadmap reviews, beta program check-ins, launch retrospectives,
  and quarterly planning sessions with clear agendas and decision records.
- Documented product decisions, tradeoffs, open questions, launch plans, and
  operating cadences in Notion for cross-functional visibility.
- Worked closely with customer-facing teams to understand implementation
  blockers, recurring support themes, and gaps in product enablement.
- Supported complex enterprise implementations by tracking operational
  dependencies, customer readiness, and unresolved workflow questions.
- Helped maintain operating rhythms for customer advisory board follow-ups,
  roadmap reviews, release readiness meetings, and post-launch retrospectives.
- Analyzed inconsistent or incomplete data sources and clearly explained when
  findings were directional rather than conclusive.
- Recommended tooling and process improvements to reduce handoff confusion
  between product, engineering, customer success, and implementation teams.
- Worked in a regulated healthcare technology environment where accuracy,
  documentation, compliance awareness, and attention to detail were important.
- Operated independently as a senior individual contributor, prioritizing
  analysis, surfacing risks early, and escalating decisions when needed.
- Created concise written updates for busy stakeholders who needed clear
  recommendations without reading raw data or long meeting notes.
- Brought five years of experience across product operations, product analytics,
  program management, and business operations for software teams.
